---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact — Josh Pearlson"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
css:
  - ../css/index.css
  - ../css/contact.css
include-after-body:
  - ../javaScript/terminal.html
---

```{=html}
<div class="jcp-terminal" id="jcp-terminal">
  <div class="t-tabs">
    <a href="/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>home</a>
    <a href="/aboutPage/about.html" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>about</a>
    <a href="/articles/blog.html" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>articles</a>
    <a href="/projects/projects.html" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>projects</a>
    <a href="/contact/contact.html" class="t-tab t-tab-active"><span class="t-tab-indicator">▸</span>contact</a>
    <div class="t-tabs-spacer"></div>
    <div class="t-title" id="t-title">jcp@joshpearlson: ~/contact</div>
  </div>
  <div class="t-body" id="t-body" data-page="other">

    <div class="jcp-contact-wrap">
      <div class="jcp-h2"># contact</div>

      <p class="jcp-contact-intro">
        The best ways to reach me. I like meeting new people — a cold email or
        LinkedIn message is always welcome.
      </p>

      <div class="jcp-contact-list">
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/josh-pearlson" class="jcp-c-row">
          <span class="jcp-c-label">LINKEDIN</span>
          <span class="jcp-c-val">linkedin.com/in/josh-pearlson</span>
          <span class="jcp-c-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/jcpearlson" class="jcp-c-row">
          <span class="jcp-c-label">GITHUB</span>
          <span class="jcp-c-val">github.com/jcpearlson</span>
          <span class="jcp-c-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:jcpearlson@gmail.com" class="jcp-c-row">
          <span class="jcp-c-label">EMAIL</span>
          <span class="jcp-c-val">jcpearlson@gmail.com</span>
          <span class="jcp-c-arrow">→</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="jcp-contact-foot">
        <div class="jcp-promptblock"><span class="jcp-prompt">$</span> cat .pgp_public_key</div>
        <details class="jcp-pgp-details">
          <summary class="jcp-pgp-summary">▸ BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK — click to expand</summary>
          <pre class="jcp-sig"># for verifying identity or sending encrypted mail

-----BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----
mDMEaeTnVxYJKwYBBAHaRw8BAQdARVFp9LoP+4AUEx1O3gODffsExyzGSe0IH1BL
QCYpDsS0LUpvc2h1YSBDYXJ0ZXIgUGVhcmxzb24gPGpjcGVhcmxzb25AZ21haWwu
Y29tPoivBBMWCgBXFiEEgWAjX4zTXG3leHTbYtplFo09g6sFAmnk51cbFIAAAAAA
BAAObWFudTIsMi41KzEuMTIsMCwzAhsDBQsJCAcCAiICBhUKCQgLAgQWAgMBAh4H
AheAAAoJEGLaZRaNPYOrxrIBAI5ZdCEncR25Yv9auVRDdA7o8PiIzHmfUjMQ294a
e0JpAP0dlUw3E8ZzKTQGMPiBImYWEfltQShRqgt7IH9Llf+aAbg4BGnk51cSCisG
AQQBl1UBBQEBB0DypSAJXQuC38j4CYKdV6ofV2Nw3C0JsTLKce3QpMOjAQMBCAeI
lAQYFgoAPBYhBIFgI1+M01xt5Xh022LaZRaNPYOrBQJp5OdXGxSAAAAAAAQADm1h
bnUyLDIuNSsxLjEyLDAsMwIbDAAKCRBi2mUWjT2Dq4+GAQCGfO9kUi9aNDmO65RN
Imr1Z3pdqoDsptaneScOaw7YpgEAyVpsp5toE8IzTiGO6vVTEu4yYngLJQTxUMdN
jKjtrAQ=
=YJ8n
-----END PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----</pre>
        </details>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
  <div class="t-status">
    <span><span class="t-status-dot">●</span> online</span>
    <span id="t-status-count">— articles · — projects</span>
    <span class="t-status-weather" id="t-status-weather">
      <span class="t-weather-glyph">·</span> NYC --°F <span class="t-sep">·</span> 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
```
